items.author: Matt Norlander
items.body_excerpt:
While inquiring about this topic in Vegas, I wondered if I might get some frenzied quotes about the state of play. Instead, the facial expressions and tones of voice from coaches were all matter-of-fact.

"It's not a 'could this happen,' it's a 'this is going to happen,'" one high-major coach said.

items.title: Hollander POTD Charles Smith. Pitt F had best yrs w/LAC (20 ppg 8 rpg). Traded to NY in 92 to play SF. Knees went bad, playing SF didn't help. Played hard but couldn't finish that shot in Game 5 in 93. Traded to SA in 95 but knees forced retirement by 97. Now an investor.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Charles Smith. Pitt F had best yrs w/LAC (20 ppg 8 rpg). Traded to NY in 92 to play SF. Knees went bad, playing SF didn't help. Played hard but couldn't finish that shot in Game 5 in 93. Traded to SA in 95 but knees forced retirement by 97. Now an investor.
